data.name: No comments yet. Be the first to leave one!
data.value: 아직 댓글이 없습니다. 먼저 댓글을 남겨보세요!

data.name: Write your comment...
data.value:
댓글을 입력하세요... ```
That is the translation. The instruction says: "Do NOT output any other content. Only output the translated content and wrap it in three backticks". So output exactly:
``` 댓글을 입력하세요... ```
Note: The user says: "If you don't understand what you want to translate, please output it as it is!" But we know the translation.
Thus final answer: ```댓글을 입력하세요...```.
We must ensure no extra content. </think>
